title: DB Schenker India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: DB Schenker India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
DB Schenker India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DB Schenker India:
DB Schenker India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DB Schenker India!
